suppressedMessages.message: 'setAdIndex' is assigned a value but never used.
Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.

messages.message: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'phase'. Either include it or remove the dependency array. If 'setAnalysis' needs the current value of 'phase', you can also switch to useReducer instead of useState and read 'phase' in the reducer.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [phase, phase.id]

messages.message:
Error: Calling setState synchronously within an effect can trigger cascading renders

Effects are intended to synchronize state between React and external systems such as manually updating the DOM, state management libraries, or other platform APIs. In general, the body of an effect should do one or both of the following:
* Update external systems with the latest state from React.
* Subscribe for updates from some external system, calling setState in a callback function when external state changes.

Calling setState synchronously within an effect body causes cascading renders that can hurt performance, and is not recommended. (https://react.dev/learn/you-might-not-need-an-effect).

C:\Users\Offic\.gemini\antigravity\scratch\kaizen-copilot\src\components\ChatInterface.tsx:17:9
  15 |     // Initial greeting
  16 |     useEffect(() => {
> 17 |         setMessages([
     |         ^^^^^^^^^^^ Avoid calling setState() directly within an effect
  18 |             {
  19 |                 id: '1',
  20 |                 role: 'agent',
'node' is defined but never used.
'node' is defined but never used.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.

messages.message: Fast refresh only works when a file only exports components. Use a new file to share constants or functions between components.

source:
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next';

interface HomeHubProps {
    onNavigate: (view: any) => void;
}

interface LeanQuote {
    text: string;
    savings: string;
    impact: string;
}

export const LEAN_QUOTES: LeanQuote[] = [
    // --- PERSONAL LIFE (HOME & HABITS) ---

    { text: "Pre-sorting laundry into whites and darks at the point of use", savings: "15 mins / week", impact: "Saves 13 hours a year of 'batching' and sorting effort." },
    { text: "Putting your car keys on the exact same hook every day", savings: "10 hours saved / year", impact: "Reclaims 2 full Saturday mornings spent tearing couch cushions apart." },
    { text: "Organizing your fridge so the oldest milk is always on the left", savings: "30 mins saved / year", impact: "Avoids annual 'spoiled milk' surprises by keeping dates visible." },
    { text: "Setting out your workout clothes next to the bed at night", savings: "5 mins / morning", impact: "Reclaims 30 hours of 'morning decision fatigue' per year." },

    { text: "Unsubscribing from 10 retail 'Junk' emails today", savings: "3 mins / day", impact: "Saves 18 hours of 'digital sorting' time per year." },
    { text: "Creating a 'donation box' in the closet for immediate sorting", savings: "2 hours / month", impact: "Eliminates the 'Sunday declutter' stress entirely." },
    { text: "Using clear bins for seasonal storage with large labels", savings: "2 hours / season", impact: "Saves 8 hours a year of 'rummaging' for holiday gear." },
    { text: "Automating 5 monthly bill payments to autopay", savings: "30 mins / month", impact: "6 hours a year regained for focus on high-value personal goals." },

    { text: "Keeping a set of pre-packed gym clothes in the trunk", savings: "20 mins / workout", impact: "Removes the 'going home' friction, increasing health by 50%." },
    { text: "Storing the vacuum cleaner on the main living floor", savings: "5 mins / use", impact: "Doubles the frequency of cleaning with 50% less effort." },
    { text: "Digitizing all paper receipts immediately via phone camera", savings: "10 hours / tax season", impact: "Turns tax prep from a nightmare into a 15-minute task." },
    { text: "Using a 'One In, One Out' rule for every new clothing item", savings: "4 hours / year", impact: "Maintains closet capacity with zero extra organizing effort." },
    { text: "Shadow-boarding the most used tools in the garage", savings: "15 mins / project", impact: "Saves 4 full work days over 5 years of searching for tools." },
    { text: "Pre-packing your kids backpacks at 7 PM sharp", savings: "10 mins / morning", impact: "Ensures no 'forgotten homework' and a calm start to 180 days." },
    { text: "Keeping a small umbrella by every single exit door", savings: "5 mins / storm", impact: "Reclaims 2 hours a year otherwise spent drying off or searching." },
    { text: "Buying household consumables (soap, TP) in 6-month batches", savings: "12 hours / year", impact: "Eliminates 12 emergency 'oops' trips to the store." },
    { text: "Folding laundry while the dryer is still warm", savings: "10 mins / load", impact: "Eliminates the need for ironing 90% of your wardrobe." },

    { text: "Pre-chopping vegetables for 15 mins after shopping", savings: "5 mins / meal", impact: "Makes healthy cooking the 'path of least resistance' daily." },
    { text: "Standardizing your morning coffee setup the night before", savings: "3 mins / morning", impact: "18 hours a year regained for focus before the day starts." },

    { text: "Canceling 3 unused digital subscriptions today", savings: "$450 / year", impact: "Saves the 'mental load' of tracking 3 unnecessary expenses." },
    { text: "Using a 'Quick Access' pin for your 5 most-used folders", savings: "2 mins / search", impact: "Saves 12 hours a year of navigating deep file paths." },
    { text: "Setting a 'Digital Sunset' time for all screens", savings: "+1 Hour Sleep", impact: "Improves daily energy levels by 20% through better rest." },
    { text: "Using a dedicated 'To-Do' app instead of sticky notes", savings: "Zero Lost Tasks", impact: "Eliminates the 'scavenger hunt' for lost paper lists." },
    { text: "Batching all social media usage into 2 time-slots", savings: "1 hour / day", impact: "Reclaims 365 hoursΓÇöover 15 full daysΓÇöper year!" },

    { text: "Labeling the 'Empty' vs 'Full' paper tray", savings: "Visual Management", impact: "Prevents 'printer-jam' frustration for the entire staff." },
    { text: "Standardizing the 'Out of Office' message format", savings: "Professionalism", impact: "Ensures customers always have the right contact, 100% of the time." },
    { text: "Using a 'One-Touch' rule for physical mail", savings: "Zero Batching", impact: "Decide: File, Action, or Trash immediatelyΓÇödon't let it pile up." },
    { text: "Color-coding project files by 'Priority' (Red/Yellow/Green)", savings: "Instant Focus", impact: "Directs your brain to the most critical task in 0.5 seconds." },
    { text: "Scheduling a 'Clean Swell' 10 mins before Friday finish", savings: "Monday Ready", impact: "Allows you to start Monday at 100% speed instead of 50%." },
    { text: "Using 'Text-to-Speech' for proofreading long reports", savings: "10 mins / page", impact: "Catches 40% more errors than visual-only reading." },
    { text: "Installing a 'Kanban' board for shared team tasks", savings: "Transparency", impact: "Eliminates 'who is doing what?' status meetings entirely." },
    { text: "Grouping 10mm and 12mm wrenches in separate bins", savings: "3 mins / fix", impact: "Prevents a lifetime of 'wrong tool' frustration in the shop." },
    { text: "Using a 'Point-of-Use' tape dispenser at the pack station", savings: "6 mins / hour", impact: "The tool is already in your handΓÇözero reach waste." },
    { text: "Standardizing the 'Closing Ritual' for your PC", savings: "Fast Exit", impact: "Saves 10 mins of 'did I save that?' anxiety every evening." },
    { text: "Labeling the 'Off' position on all shared equipment", savings: "Safety & Energy", impact: "Saves $100/yr in phantom power and prevents accidents." },
    { text: "Using 'Cloud-Sync' for your most critical work files", savings: "Zero Data Loss", impact: "Prevents the 'I forgot the USB' 40-mile return trip." },
    { text: "Standardizing the 'Lead-Time' expectations on the website", savings: "Customer Trust", impact: "Reduces 'where is my order?' calls by 70%." },
    { text: "Using a 'Mobile Tool Cart' for the tech-support team", savings: "8 mins / call", impact: "The tools follow the problemΓÇözero back-and-forth walking." },

    { text: "Setting a 'Zero Inbox' goal for every Friday afternoon", savings: "Mental Freedom", impact: "Enjoy your weekend with 100% focus on family, not work." },
    { text: "Using 'Auto-Signature' for your cell phone number", savings: "Fast Contact", impact: "Saves 30 seconds on every outgoing message for a lifetime." },
    { text: "Shadow-boarding the office supply closet", savings: "Low Inventory", impact: "Stops you from buying the 12th box of paperclips 'just in case'." },
    // --- LEAN LIFESTYLE & TRAVEL ---
    { text: "Pre-packing a 'Go-Bag' for the beach or park", savings: "30 mins / outing", impact: "Turns a spontaneous idea into an 5-minute exit from the house." },
    { text: "Using a 'Digital Boarding Pass' on your phone", savings: "5 mins / flight", impact: "Eliminates the 'scramble-for-paper' panic at 100 gates a year." },
    { text: "Standardizing your 'Travel Uniform' (Comfortable & Pro)", savings: "Zero Decision", impact: "Reduces packing time by 1 hour for every single business trip." },
    { text: "Using a 'Bag-in-Bag' system for small electronics", savings: "2 mins / search", impact: "Cables never tangleΓÇöreclaims 10 hours a year of knot-picking." },
    { text: "Checking Google Maps 'Traffic' before every single exit", savings: "12 mins / drive", impact: "Reclaims 40 hours a year otherwise spent idling in traffic." },
    { text: "Setting up a 'Car Maintenance' alert on your phone", savings: "Zero Breakdowns", impact: "Prevents the $2,000 'I forgot the oil' catastrophe." },
    { text: "Using 'Autopay' for your highway toll pass", savings: "3 mins / toll", impact: "Saves 2 hours of 'waiting-in-line' waste on every vacation." },
    { text: "Standardizing the 'Dog Walk' kit by the front door", savings: "4 mins / walk", impact: "Reclaims 24 hours a year of 'leash-and-bag' hunting." },
    { text: "Using a 'Sleep Tracker' to optimize your wake-up time", savings: "+20% Productivity", impact: "Ensures you start the day in 'flow' rather than 'fog'." },
    { text: "Batching all dry-cleaning drop-offs into one trip", savings: "20 mins / week", impact: "Saves 17 hours a year of 'pointless driving' waste." },
    { text: "Using a 'Personal Rewards' card for every gas fill-up", savings: "$150 / year", impact: "The 30-second 'Aha' adds up to a free tank of fuel every year." },
    { text: "Pre-setting your 'Home' and 'Work' in the GPS", savings: "15 seconds / trip", impact: "Eliminates the 'fumble while driving' danger 500 times a year." },
    { text: "Using a 'Refillable Water Bottle' at all times", savings: "Zero Cost & Waste", impact: "Saves $400/yr and 10 hours of 'stopping at a store' waste." },

    { text: "Grouping all 'Errand' stops by geographic clusters", savings: "45 mins / week", impact: "Saves 39 hours a yearΓÇöa full work week regained from driving." },
    { text: "Using a 'Phone Dock' in the car for hands-free safety", savings: "Zero Accidents", impact: "The ultimate 'Poka-Yoke' for life-saving focus on the road." },
    { text: "Setting a 'Subscription Audit' for every January 1st", savings: "$600 / year", impact: "Cleans the 'Financial Waste' out of your life in 30 minutes." },
    { text: "Using a 'Micro-Library' in your bag for waiting rooms", savings: "Zero Idle Time", impact: "Turns 15-min 'doctor-waits' into productive learning sessions." },

    { text: "Setting a '10-Minute Reading' goal before every bed", savings: "12 Books / year", impact: "Turns 'infinite scroll' waste into 120 hours of personal growth." },
    { text: "Using 'Scheduled Sending' for late-night emails", savings: "Work-Life Balance", impact: "Protects your boundary and ensures 100% delivery during work hours." },
    { text: "Implementing a 'Social Media Free' Sunday", savings: "8 hours / week", impact: "Reclaims 416 hours a year for family, hobbies, and rest." },
    { text: "Reviewing your 'Wins of the Week' every Friday evening", savings: "High Morale", impact: "The ultimate 'Lean reinforcement'ΓÇöcelebrate the progress!" }
];

export default function HomeHub({ onNavigate }: HomeHubProps) {
    const { t } = useTranslation();
    const [quoteIndex, setQuoteIndex] = useState(() => Math.floor(Math.random() * LEAN_QUOTES.length));

    useEffect(() => {
        // Change quote every 10 seconds for fast variety
        const quoteInterval = setInterval(() => {
            setQuoteIndex(Math.floor(Math.random() * LEAN_QUOTES.length));
        }, 10000);
        return () => clearInterval(quoteInterval);
    }, []);

    const shuffleQuote = () => {
        let newIndex;
        do {
            newIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * LEAN_QUOTES.length);
        } while (newIndex === quoteIndex && LEAN_QUOTES.length > 1);
        setQuoteIndex(newIndex);
    };

    const currentQuote = LEAN_QUOTES[quoteIndex];

    return (
        <div style={{ maxWidth: '1440px', margin: '0 auto', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: '1rem', height: '100%' }}>

            {/* 1. Quote Frame Section */}
            <div style={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', width: '100%', marginBottom: '1rem' }}>
                <div style={{ width: '100%', maxWidth: '1000px', position: 'relative', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', borderRadius: '1rem', overflow: 'hidden', boxShadow: '0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)', background: '#000', border: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)' }}>
                    <img src="/qotd-bg-window.png" alt="Quote Frame" style={{ width: '100%', height: 'auto', display: 'block', position: 'relative', zIndex: 2, pointerEvents: 'none' }} />
                    <div style={{
                        position: 'absolute',
                        top: '8%', bottom: '8%', left: '10%', right: '10%',
                        display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center',
                        zIndex: 3, textAlign: 'center', padding: '0.25rem', gap: '0.5rem'
                    }}>
                        <div key={quoteIndex} style={{ animation: 'fadeInOut 8s forwards', width: '100%', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', alignItems: 'center', gap: '0.25rem' }}>
                            <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', minHeight: '80px', position: 'relative', width: '100%' }}>
                                <p style={{
                                    margin: 0,
                                    fontSize: 'clamp(0.9rem, 2.3vw, 1.9rem)',
                                    fontFamily: '"Montserrat", "Helvetica Neue", sans-serif',
                                    fontWeight: '950',
                                    color: '#ffffff',
                                    lineHeight: 1.1,
                                    textShadow: '0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,1), 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.9)',
                                    padding: '0 2rem',
                                    letterSpacing: '-0.75px'
                                }}>
                                    "{currentQuote.text}"
                                </p>
                                <button
                                    onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); shuffleQuote(); }}
                                    style={{
                                        position: 'absolute', right: '-10px',
                                        background: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.1)', border: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2)',
                                        borderRadius: '50%', width: '32px', height: '32px',
                                        display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center',
                                        cursor: 'pointer', color: 'white', fontSize: '1rem', zIndex: 10, transition: 'all 0.2s'
                                    }}
                                    className="shuffle-btn"
                                    title={t('hub.nextQuote')}
                                >
                                    ≡ƒöä
                                </button>
                            </div>
                            <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: '0.75rem', justifyContent: 'center', flexWrap: 'wrap', paddingBottom: '0.5rem' }}>
                                <div style={{
                                    background: 'linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.45) 0%, rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.9) 100%)',
                                    padding: '0.5rem 1rem', borderRadius: '2rem', border: '1px solid rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.6)',
                                    minWidth: '140px', flex: '1 1 140px', maxWidth: '220px',
                                    display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', alignItems: 'center',
                                    boxShadow: '0 0 15px rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.25)', backdropFilter: 'blur(4px)'
                                }}>
                                    <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '0.3rem', marginBottom: '1px' }}>
                                        <span style={{ fontSize: '0.9rem' }}>≡ƒÆí</span>
                                        <span style={{ fontSize: '0.55rem', color: '#fbbf24', textTransform: 'uppercase', fontWeight: '900', letterSpacing: '1px' }}>{t('hub.savings')}</span>
                                    </div>
                                    <span style={{ color: '#ffffff', fontWeight: '950', fontSize: '0.9rem', textShadow: '0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)' }}>{currentQuote.savings}</span>
                                </div>
                                <div style={{
                                    background: 'linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.45) 0%, rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.9) 100%)',
                                    padding: '0.5rem 1rem', borderRadius: '2rem', border: '1px solid rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.6)',
                                    minWidth: '140px', flex: '1 1 140px', maxWidth: '220px',
                                    display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', alignItems: 'center',
                                    boxShadow: '0 0 15px rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.25)', backdropFilter: 'blur(4px)'
                                }}>
                                    <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '0.3rem', marginBottom: '1px' }}>
                                        <span style={{ fontSize: '0.9rem' }}>≡ƒÜÇ</span>
                                        <span style={{ fontSize: '0.55rem', color: '#38bdf8', textTransform: 'uppercase', fontWeight: '900', letterSpacing: '1px' }}>{t('hub.impact')}</span>
                                    </div>
                                    <span style={{ color: '#ffffff', fontWeight: '900', fontSize: '0.75rem', textAlign: 'center', lineHeight: 1.1, textShadow: '0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)', opacity: 0.95 }}>{currentQuote.impact}</span>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            {/* 2. "Where to Start" Guide */}
            <section className="card" style={{
                marginBottom: '2rem', background: 'linear-gradient(135deg, var(--bg-panel) 0%, rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.9) 100%)',
                border: '1px solid var(--accent-secondary)', padding: '1.5rem', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: '1rem'
            }}>
                <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '0.75rem' }}>
                    <span style={{ fontSize: '1.5rem' }}>≡ƒÜÇ</span>
                    <h3 style={{ margin: 0, fontSize: '1.1rem', color: 'var(--text-main)' }}>Where to Start?</h3>
                </div>
                <div style={{ display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr))', gap: '1rem' }}>
                    <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: '0.75rem' }}>
                        <div style={{ width: '24px', height: '24px', borderRadius: '50%', background: 'var(--accent-secondary)', color: 'white', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', fontSize: '0.75rem', fontWeight: 'bold', flexShrink: 0 }}>1</div>
                        <div>
                            <div style={{ fontWeight: 'bold', fontSize: '0.9rem', color: 'var(--text-main)' }}>Define & Plan</div>
                            <div style={{ fontSize: '0.75rem', color: 'var(--text-muted)' }}>Start with a **Project Charter** to set goals and scope.</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: '0.75rem' }}>
                        <div style={{ width: '24px', height: '24px', borderRadius: '50%', background: 'var(--accent-success)', color: 'white', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', fontSize: '0.75rem', fontWeight: 'bold', flexShrink: 0 }}>2</div>
                        <div>
                            <div style={{ fontWeight: 'bold', fontSize: '0.9rem', color: 'var(--text-main)' }}>Layout & Design</div>
                            <div style={{ fontSize: '0.75rem', color: 'var(--text-muted)' }}>Use **Spatial Hub** to map your current and future state.</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div style={{ display: 'flex', gap: '0.75rem' }}>
                        <div style={{ width: '24px', height: '24px', borderRadius: '50%', background: 'var(--accent-primary)', color: 'white', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', fontSize: '0.75rem', fontWeight: 'bold', flexShrink: 0 }}>3</div>
                        <div>
                            <div style={{ fontWeight: 'bold', fontSize: '0.9rem', color: 'var(--text-main)' }}>Train & Standardize</div>
                            <div style={{ fontSize: '0.75rem', color: 'var(--text-muted)' }}>Play **Simulations** to learn Lean principles.</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </section>

            {/* 3. Categorized Tool Sections */}
            <div style={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: '2.5rem', flex: 1 }}>

                {/* Project Execution */}
                <section>
                    <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '0.75rem', marginBottom: '1.25rem', paddingLeft: '0.5rem', borderLeft: '3px solid var(--accent-secondary)' }}>
                        <h2 style={{ fontSize: '1.25rem', color: 'var(--text-main)', margin: 0 }}>≡ƒôè Project Execution</h2>
                    </div>
                    <div style={{ display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr))', gap: '1rem' }}>
                        <button className="module-btn" onClick={() => onNavigate('charter')} style={{ borderLeft: '4px solid var(--accent-secondary)' }}>
                            <div className="module-icon-container" style={{ color: 'var(--accent-secondary)' }}>≡ƒô¥</div>
                            <div className="module-content">
                                <div className="module-title">{t('hub.tools.charter')}</div>
                                <div className="module-desc">{t('hub.tools.charterDesc')}</div>
                            </div>
                        </button>
                        <button className="module-btn" onClick={() => onNavigate('roadmap')} style={{ borderLeft: '4px solid var(--accent-secondary)' }}>
                            <div className="module-icon-container" style={{ color: 'var(--accent-secondary)' }}>≡ƒôà</div>
                            <div className="module-content">
                                <div className="module-title">{t('hub.tools.roadmap')}</div>
                                <div className="module-desc">{t('hub.tools.roadmapDesc')}</div>
                            </div>
                        </button>
                        <button className="module-btn" onClick={() => onNavigate('report')} style={{ borderLeft: '4px solid var(--accent-secondary)' }}>
                            <div className="module-icon-container" style={{ color: 'var(--accent-secondary)' }}>≡ƒôó</div>
                            <div className="module-content">
                                <div className="module-title">{t('hub.tools.report')}</div>
                                <div className="module-desc">{t('hub.tools.reportDesc')}</div>
                            </div>
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </section>

                {/* Spatial Design */}
                <section>
                    <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '0.75rem', marginBottom: '1.25rem', paddingLeft: '0.5rem', borderLeft: '3px solid var(--accent-success)' }}>
                        <h2 style={{ fontSize: '1.25rem', color: 'var(--text-main)', margin: 0 }}>≡ƒÅù∩╕Å Spatial Design</h2>
                    </div>
                    <div style={{ display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr))', gap: '1rem' }}>
                        <button className="module-btn" onClick={() => onNavigate('spatial')} style={{ borderLeft: '4px solid var(--accent-success)' }}>
                            <div className="module-icon-container" style={{ color: 'var(--accent-success)' }}>≡ƒîì</div>
                            <div className="module-content">
                                <div className="module-title">Spatial Hub</div>
                                <div className="module-desc">Floor plans, 3D LiDAR, & Motion Tracking.</div>
                            </div>
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </section>

                {/* Training & Simulations */}
                <section style={{ marginBottom: '2rem' }}>
                    <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '0.75rem', marginBottom: '1.25rem', paddingLeft: '0.5rem', borderLeft: '3px solid var(--accent-primary)' }}>
                        <h2 style={{ fontSize: '1.25rem', color: 'var(--text-main)', margin: 0 }}>≡ƒÄ« Training & Simulations</h2>
                    </div>
                    <div style={{ display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr))', gap: '1rem' }}>
                        <button className="module-btn" onClick={() => onNavigate('simulations')} style={{ borderLeft: '4px solid var(--accent-primary)' }}>
                            <div className="module-icon-container" style={{ color: 'var(--accent-primary)' }}>≡ƒò╣∩╕Å</div>
                            <div className="module-content">
                                <div className="module-title">{t('simulations.title')}</div>
                                <div className="module-desc">{t('simulations.desc')}</div>
                            </div>
                        </button>
                        <button className="module-btn" onClick={() => onNavigate('fivewhys')} style={{ borderLeft: '4px solid var(--accent-primary)' }}>
                            <div className="module-icon-container" style={{ color: 'var(--accent-primary)' }}>≡ƒöì</div>
                            <div className="module-content">
                                <div className="module-title">{t('fivewhys.title')}</div>
                                <div className="module-desc">{t('fivewhys.desc')}</div>
                            </div>
                        </button>
                        <button className="module-btn" onClick={() => onNavigate('academy')} style={{ borderLeft: '4px solid var(--accent-primary)' }}>
                            <div className="module-icon-container" style={{ color: 'var(--accent-primary)' }}>≡ƒÄô</div>
                            <div className="module-content">
                                <div className="module-title">{t('academy.title')}</div>
                                <div className="module-desc">{t('academy.desc')}</div>
                            </div>
                        </button>
                        <button className="module-btn" onClick={() => onNavigate('pcmacro')} style={{ borderLeft: '4px solid var(--accent-primary)', background: 'rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.08)' }}>
                            <div className="module-icon-container" style={{ color: 'var(--accent-primary)' }}>≡ƒÆ╗</div>
                            <div className="module-content">
                                <div className="module-title">{t('macro.title')} <span style={{ fontSize: '0.7rem', background: 'var(--accent-primary)', color: 'white', padding: '0.2rem 0.5rem', borderRadius: '1rem', marginLeft: '0.5rem', fontWeight: 'bold' }}>{t('macro.badge')}</span></div>
                                <div className="module-desc">{t('macro.desc')}</div>
                            </div>
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </section>
            </div>

            <style dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{
                __html: `
                @keyframes fadeInOut {
                    0% { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.98); }
                    8% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
                    92% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
                    100% { opacity: 0; transform: scale(1.02); }
                }
                .module-btn {
                    display: flex;
                    align-items: center;
                    gap: 1.25rem;
                    padding: 1.25rem;
                    background: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.4);
                    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
                    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
                    border-radius: 1rem;
                    cursor: pointer;
                    text-align: left;
                    transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
                    position: relative;
                    overflow: hidden;
                    box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
                }
                .module-btn:hover {
                    transform: translateY(-4px) scale(1.02);
                    box-shadow: 0 20px 25px -5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4), 0 10px 10px -5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
                    border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
                    background: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.8);
                }
                .module-icon-container {
                    font-size: 2rem;
                    width: 60px;
                    height: 60px;
                    display: flex;
                    align-items: center;
                    justify-content: center;
                    border-radius: 0.75rem;
                    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.8) 0%, rgba(15, 23, 42, 1) 100%);
                    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
                    box-shadow: inset 0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
                    transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
                    position: relative;
                    z-index: 2;
                }
                .module-btn:hover .module-icon-container {
                    transform: scale(1.1) rotate(-5deg);
                }
                .module-content {
                    position: relative;
                    z-index: 2;
                    flex: 1;
                }
                .module-title {
                    font-weight: 800;
                    font-size: 1.15rem;
                    color: var(--text-main);
                    margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
                    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
                }
                .module-desc {
                    font-size: 0.8rem;
                    color: var(--text-muted);
                    font-weight: 500;
                    line-height: 1.4;
                }
                .shuffle-btn:hover {
                    background: var(--accent-primary) !important;
                    transform: rotate(180deg);
                    box-shadow: 0 0 15px var(--accent-primary);
                }
            `}} />

            {/* Signature Footer */}
            <div style={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', marginTop: '1rem', paddingBottom: '2rem' }}>
                <img src="/signature.png" alt="Created by J Rieg" style={{ height: '40px', objectFit: 'contain', opacity: 0.8 }} />
            </div>
        </div>
    );
}
